records.question: Which cities where city is Shanghai have temperatures exactly 18.3 in March, exactly 19.4 in November, at least 20.6 in July and September, and at most 20.6 in August and at most 18.3 in December?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
JOIN temperature ON city.city_id = temperature.city_id
WHERE temperature.sep >= 20.6 AND temperature.jul >= 20.6 AND temperature.mar = 18.3 AND temperature.nov = 19.4 AND city.city = 'Shanghai' AND temperature.dec <= 18.3 AND temperature.aug <= 20.6
records.pred_sql: select city.city_id from city join temperature on city.city_id = temperature.city_id where lower(city.city) like '%shanghai%' and temperature.mar = 18.3 and temperature.nov = 19.4 and temperature.jul >= 20.6 and temperature.sep >= 20.6 and temperature.aug <= 20.6 and temperature.dec <= 18.3 limit 5
records.thought: Filter cities named Shanghai with exact and range temperature conditions for specified months, then select city_id with limit 5.

records.question: What cities where hanyu_pinyin is Jīnhuá have January temperatures at most 26.7, March temperatures exactly 27.8, and October temperatures at most 30.6?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
JOIN temperature ON city.city_id = temperature.city_id
WHERE temperature.jan <= 26.7 AND temperature.mar = 27.8 AND city.hanyu_pinyin = 'Jīnhuá' AND temperature.oct <= 30.6
records.pred_sql: select city.city_id from city join temperature on city.city_id = temperature.city_id where lower(city.hanyu_pinyin) like '%jīnhuá%' and temperature.jan <= 26.7 and temperature.mar = 27.8 and temperature.oct <= 30.6 limit 5
records.thought: Filter cities with hanyu_pinyin 'jīnhuá' and temperature conditions for January, March, and October from the temperature table, joining on city_id.

records.question: Which cities are exactly named Ningbo ( Zhejiang )?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
WHERE city.city = 'Ningbo ( Zhejiang )'
records.pred_sql: select city.city_id from city where lower(city.city) = 'ningbo' limit 5
records.thought: To find cities exactly named 'Ningbo' and located in Zhejiang, we filter the city name for 'ningbo' and the Hanzi or other column indicating Zhejiang if available; since no explicit region column is given, we filter only by city name 'ningbo'.

records.question: Which city has the name Suzhou ( Jiangsu ) with hanzi 苏州/ 蘇州, a regional population of at least 10465994, a GDP exactly 1071.7, and hanyu_pinyin exactly Sūzhōu?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
WHERE city.city = 'Suzhou ( Jiangsu )' AND city.hanzi = '苏州/ 蘇州' AND city.regional_population >= 10465994 AND city.gdp = 1071.7 AND city.hanyu_pinyin = 'Sūzhōu'
records.pred_sql: select city.city_id from city where lower(city.city) = 'suzhou ( jiangsu )' and (city.hanzi like '%苏州%' or city.hanzi like '%蘇州%') and city.regional_population >= 10465994 and city.gdp = 1071.7 and city.hanyu_pinyin = 'Sūzhōu' limit 5
records.thought: Filter the city table for the exact city name 'suzhou ( jiangsu )', hanzi containing '苏州' or '蘇州', regional population at least 10465994, GDP exactly 1071.7, and hanyu_pinyin exactly 'sūzhōu'.

records.question: Where is the city Yangzhou ( Jiangsu ) whose hanzi is 扬州/ 揚州, with a GDP exactly 263.03 and a regional population at most 4459760?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
WHERE city.gdp = 263.03 AND city.regional_population <= 4459760 AND city.hanzi = '扬州/ 揚州' AND city.city = 'Yangzhou ( Jiangsu )'
records.pred_sql: select city.city_id from city where lower(city.city) like '%yangzhou%' and (city.hanzi like '%扬州%' or city.hanzi like '%揚州%') and city.gdp = 263.03 and city.regional_population <= 4459760 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter the city table for the city named Yangzhou with the specified Hanzi, GDP exactly 263.03, and regional population at most 4459760.

records.question: Which cities have a GDP of at least 408.02 and average temperatures of at least 18.9 in February, at least 19.4 in March, but no more than 22.8 in October?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
JOIN temperature ON city.city_id = temperature.city_id
WHERE temperature.feb >= 18.9 AND temperature.oct <= 22.8 AND temperature.mar >= 19.4 AND city.gdp >= 408.02
records.pred_sql: select city.city_id from city join temperature on city.city_id = temperature.city_id where city.gdp >= 408.02 and temperature.feb >= 18.9 and temperature.mar >= 19.4 and temperature.oct <= 22.8 limit 5
records.thought: Filter cities with GDP >= 408.02 and temperature conditions in February, March, and October by joining city and temperature tables.

SELECT city.city_id FROM city

records.pred_sql: select city.city_id from city where city.hanzi = '苏州' or city.hanzi = '蘇州' limit 5;

records.question: Which cities have a June temperature that is exactly 22.8 degrees?

SELECT city.city_id FROM city
JOIN temperature ON city.city_id = temperature.city_id
WHERE temperature.jun = 22.8
records.pred_sql: select city.city_id from city join temperature on city.city_id = temperature.city_id where temperature.jun = 22.8 limit 5
records.thought: To find cities with a June temperature of exactly 22.8 degrees, join the city and temperature tables on City_ID and filter by the June temperature.

records.question: Which cities have a GDP of at least 266.81 and where the hanzi is 嘉兴/ 嘉興?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
WHERE city.gdp >= 266.81 AND city.hanzi = '嘉兴/ 嘉興'
records.pred_sql: select city.city_id from city where city.gdp >= 266.81 and (lower(city.hanzi) like '%嘉兴%' or lower(city.hanzi) like '%嘉興%') limit 5;
records.thought: Filter cities with GDP >= 266.81 and Hanzi matching 嘉兴 or 嘉興 using like for case-insensitive match, then select city_id with limit 5.

records.question: Which cities where hanzi is 南京 and hanyu_pinyin is Nánjīng have a GDP of at most 614.55 and temperatures with January at least 26.1, March and April at most 26.1, and October at most 28.3?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
JOIN temperature ON city.city_id = temperature.city_id
WHERE temperature.mar <= 26.1 AND temperature.jan >= 26.1 AND temperature.apr <= 26.1 AND city.hanyu_pinyin = 'Nánjīng' AND temperature.oct <= 28.3 AND city.hanzi = '南京' AND city.gdp <= 614.55
records.pred_sql: select city.city_id from city join temperature on city.city_id = temperature.city_id where lower(city.hanzi) like '%南京%' and lower(city.hanyu_pinyin) like '%nánjīng%' and city.gdp <= 614.55 and temperature.jan >= 26.1 and temperature.mar <= 26.1 and temperature.apr <= 26.1 and temperature.oct <= 28.3 limit 5
records.thought: Filter cities by hanzi and hanyu_pinyin with the specified GDP and temperature conditions by joining city and temperature tables.
